Pains me a bit they got rid of Reuben for... reasons... but hey, until 3 they changed Dante's voice in every game. Wonder if there's Vergil in it then would they do the same? Replace Mr. Daniel with someone else? Cause it would be pretty unfair to kick Reuben but not Dan.
Anyways, Deadweight sounds better than expected, +4 points to Ravenclaw!

comment_text:
God damn it, why does all Western animation look the same? It's like Witcher, Invincible even, just change the characters around. 

Just a shame because its like commissioned mandated animated shows rather than something to get super excited about like "holy shit, they're making this IP I know and love into an anime? This should be a dream come true right?" Then they all just look like Castlevania with, more than just a different skin, better than that but you know what I mean. I've not played many of the games so maybe that's why I was hoping it would look better as I'm not as emotionally invested in the story/characters as much so I'm probably focusing on the animation more than an average fan. Still, Netflix, I'd like to see something different in the animation department, please!
